name: bap-shop
description: BAP Shop - Tienda online de segunda mano

scripts.deploy:worker:staging: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:store:staging: pnpm build:store:staging && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy apps/store/dist --project-name bap-shop-store-staging --branch staging
scripts.deploy:admin:staging: pnpm build:admin:staging && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy apps/admin/dist --project-name bap-shop-admin-staging --branch staging
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm deploy:worker:staging && pnpm deploy:store:staging && pnpm deploy:admin:staging
scripts.deploy:worker:production: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:store:production: pnpm build:store:production && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy apps/store/dist --project-name bap-shop-store --branch main
scripts.deploy:admin:production: pnpm build:admin:production && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy apps/admin/dist --project-name bap-shop-admin --branch main
scripts.typecheck: pnpm typecheck:store && pnpm typecheck:admin && pnpm typecheck:worker
scripts.test: pnpm test:worker && pnpm test:store && pnpm test:admin
